INT-014.title: Benefit verification status
INT-014.description: Coordinators manually compile benefit-verification status for each patient case from three separate systems (payer portal, EHR, copay assistance tool).

INT-014.title: Claim denial appeal letters
INT-014.description: Appeal letters for denied claims are written from scratch each time by copying and editing an old letter.

INT-014.title: Prior-auth status chasing
INT-014.description: Staff chase prior-authorization status by phone, sitting on hold with payers to learn if a case was approved.

INT-031.title: Order status summaries
INT-031.description: Schedulers hand-assemble a status summary for each open production order from the orchestration system, email threads, and shared sheets before the daily standup.

INT-031.title: Production reconciliation
INT-031.description: Planned versus actual order quantities are reconciled line by line between the orchestration system and the ERP every month.

INT-031.title: Work-instruction lookup
INT-031.description: Coordinators hunt through scattered SOPs to find the right work instruction when a line operator has a question.

INT-022.title: Account reconciliation
INT-022.description: Analysts reconcile ERP balances to subledgers and spreadsheets at month-end, chasing down every variance for each account.

INT-022.title: Management reporting pack
INT-022.description: The monthly management reporting pack is built by copying numbers out of four or five different sources into a deck.

INT-008.title: Claim denial appeal letters
INT-008.description: Denial appeal letters are drafted by rewriting old letters for the new patient and specific denial reason, a blank-page effort each time.

INT-008.title: Coverage question research
INT-008.description: Coordinators dig through policy documents and SOPs to find the exact clause that answers a patient's coverage question.

INT-040.title: Vendor and SaaS spend review
INT-040.description: Vendor and SaaS spend is reviewed quarterly by going through invoices line by line to find duplicate tools, overlapping licenses, and unused subscriptions.

INT-040.title: Contract summary memos
INT-040.description: Contract summary memos for leadership are drafted by pulling key terms, renewal dates, and pricing out of long PDF contracts into a one-pager.
